name: RMW - Stoeger Double Defense
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Its a modern spin on the age old double barelled shotgun concept. This one is the over and under barelled version. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
